name: Webex
description: Monitor Webex users and team configuration for communication compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to developer.webex.com
2. Click your avatar, then 'My Webex Apps'
3. Create a Bot or use a Personal Access Token
4. Copy the access token and paste it below

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Webex users and verifies active accounts

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Webex teams are configured for team communication
